title: WOMEN'S RESIDENTIAL SERVICES - 211info
text: WILLAMETTE FAMILY SUNRISE HOUSE & FAMILIES IN RECOVERY WOMEN'S RESIDENTIAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides residential substance abuse treatment. Eligibility: Females age 18 and and female individuals with children ages 0-5 Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 762-4300 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 762-4300 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: OHP and some other insurance plans accepted. Sliding fee scale for clients paying in cash. DOCUMENTS: Photo ID. If pregnant, proof of pregnancy. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish and signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Call for information Services: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment * Women Residential Substance Use Disorder Treatment Facilities * Women Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
